CREATE TABLE test_vectors (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, vec ANY);
INSERT INTO test_vectors (id, vec) VALUES (1, vector (1, 2, 3));
INSERT INTO test_vectors (id, vec) VALUES (2, vector ('a', 'b', vector (1.5, 3.14)));
INSERT INTO test_vectors (id, vec) VALUES (3, vector (NULL, vector ()));
INSERT INTO test_vectors (id, vec) VALUES (4, vector (vector (1), vector (2, 3), vector (4, vector (5, 6))));
SELECT DUMP_VEC(vec) FROM test_vectors WHERE id = 1;
SELECT DUMP_VEC(vec) FROM test_vectors WHERE id = 2;
INSERT INTO test_vectors (id, vec) VALUES (5, vector (vector (vector (1, 2), vector (3, 4, vector (5)))));
SELECT DUMP_VEC(vector (select vec from test_vectors where id = 3));
SELECT DUMP_VEC(vector (1, 2, 3)) AS result_vector, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_vectors) AS vector_count;
SELECT DUMP_VEC(vector (SELECT vec FROM test_vectors WHERE id IN (1, 2)));
SELECT DUMP_VEC(vector ('string', vector (() , vector ('nested')))) AS nested_vector;
SELECT DUMP_VEC(vector (1, 2, (SELECT vector(3, 4) FROM test_vectors WHERE id = 1)));
SELECT DUMP_VEC(vector (1, 2, vector (SELECT vec FROM test_vectors WHERE id = 2)));
